'''Uba III''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Uba system/Legends|Uba system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It was a home to an [[Ubese/Legends|Ubese]] colony, which was [[Bombardment of the Uba system|destroyed]] by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in [[1800 BBY]] during the [[New Sith Wars]], an act that aroused massive amounts of contempt for the Order. It became an [[Uba's asteroid belt|asteroid belt]].
